tracks.rawText: 2:13Helado Rockv5Playful rock with bright power chords, crunchy electric guitar, and handclaps driving a bouncy 4/4 groove, Childlike toy piano motifs, glockenspiel, and simple call-and-response vocals sit over bass and punchy snare, Clean verses lift into a singalong chorus, with light distortion, room reverb, and a playful lo-fi edge4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Helado Rock

tracks.rawText: 7:59Smoldering Liturgyv5.5Dark progressive techno ritual at 128 BPM with a relentless 4/4 kick, rumbling sub layer, and hypnotic offbeat bass pulse, Metallic percussion, tribal toms, filtered noise sweeps, phased arps, and analog drone pads build through long modulation, tunnel-delay echoes, and a cavernous, overdriven low-end groove4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Smoldering Liturgy
